CloudMount

Mount your OneDrive and SharePoint files as local folders.

Waiting for login…

A browser window should have opened. If not, copy the URL below and open it manually.

Add Cloud Sources

Select what to mount on your computer.

SharePoint Libraries
Added

All Set

Your drives are mounted and ready to use.

    Your files are accessible in your file manager. CloudMount runs in the system tray — right-click the tray icon to manage mounts or open settings.
